title: Co-Pilot — instant sources of truth
motto: Foundationals first. Structures hold when truths corroborate — never a single path alone.
hold_rule: What holds Final_Eye together: mandate genesis → sealed code → chained frames → woven trust → sovereign witness → truth forward → one whole kill authority.

sources.title: Field mandate
sources.holds: Every protected op knows why it exists; egress, flash, offense rules
sources.label: doctrine

sources.title: Code seal
sources.truth: SHA-256 manifest of all zocr*.py — tamper evident before look/stream
sources.holds: Code cannot drift under operator feet mid-mission
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Frame hash chain
sources.truth: WRDT-inspired seal chain on stream frames
sources.holds: Vision transport cannot swap frames silently
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: GVC1 / GRKMF1
sources.holds: Media layer stays sovereign; tamper rejected at unpack
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Sovereign time
sources.truth: Sealed monotonic witness — micron pulse receipts
sources.holds: Time cannot be gaslit; eyeball always timestamps truth
sources.label: measured

sources.title: IRTN trust mesh
sources.truth: Interwoven redundancies — Hostess7 corroborates ZOCR vision
sources.holds: No single path owns truth; woven paths quorum
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Truth doctrine
sources.truth: 94% noise · 6% signal — truth gates before adapt
sources.holds: Honesty default; lies detected before spread
sources.label: doctrine

sources.title: Heaven / Hell gate
sources.truth: Hell first — heaven passes at zero cost, no friendly fire
sources.holds: Hostility sorted before strike; Veritas weapons armed
sources.label: doctrine

sources.title: One whole kill
sources.truth: Kill switches at choke points only — eyes protected
sources.holds: Operator can always disengage; no redundant guards
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Twin entity eyeballs
sources.holds: Living perceive + truth strike in one socket
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Grok16 field compiler
sources.truth: G16 @ gnu++26 — field_opt primary; Queen forge sub-layer
sources.holds: Vision kernels compile against real toolchain truth
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Assist contract
sources.truth: One tenant — bounded slots, no overflow
sources.holds: Shared system never overdrawn; robotics stays assistive
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Preserve cascade
sources.truth: Confidence always in Vision — never presume vision loss
sources.holds: RF jam / blackout failovers; last-good vault
sources.label: implemented

sources.title: Pattern weave
sources.holds: Injected grid/moiré cannot enter vault as real
sources.label: implemented
